name: On the Lookout, Delta
expansion: Booster Pack The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【AUTO】 [(1) Put 1 card from your hand into your waiting room] When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may pay the cost. If you do, search your deck for up to 1 《Eminence in Shadow》 character, reveal it to your opponent, put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
【AUTO】 When this card becomes 【REVERSE】, if this card's battle opponent is level 0 or lower, you may put that character at the bottom of your opponent's deck.
flavor_text: Hey, boss!

name: In Disguise, Beta
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【CONT】 If you have 1 or less other characters in your center stage, this card gets +1 level and +2500 power.
【AUTO】 At the beginning of your opponent's attack phase, you may move this card to an open position of your center stage with a character facing this card.

name: Departure, Seven Shadows
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card attacks, choose 1 of your other 《Eminence in Shadow》 characters, and that character gets +1500 power and "【AUTO】 Encore [Put 1 character from your hand into your waiting room]" until the end of your opponent's next turn.
【AUTO】 When this card becomes 【REVERSE】, if this card's battle opponent is level 1 or lower, you may 【REVERSE】 that character.
flavor_text: The hour has come. It is time for us to leave you.

name: Form Restored, Alpha
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【AUTO】 When you use this card's "Backup", if you have an 《Eminence in Shadow》 character, choose 1 of your characters in battle, and that character gets +1000 power until end of turn.

【ACT】 【COUNTER】 Backup 1000, Level 1 [Put this card from your hand into your waiting room] (Choose 1 of your characters that is being frontal attacked, and that character gets +1000 power until end of turn)
flavor_text: Cid: "I have broken the curse that was gnawing away at you."

name: Crowbars Are Great, Minoru
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【CONT】 During your turn, if you have 2 or more other 《Eminence in Shadow》 characters, this card gets +2000 power.

【AUTO】 【CXCOMBO】 [Put 1 《Eminence in Shadow》 character from your hand into your waiting room] At the beginning of your encore step, if "Stylish Ruffian Slayer" is in your climax area, this card is in your center stage, you have 2 or more other 《Eminence in Shadow》 characters, and there is no character facing this card or the character facing this card is 【REVERSE】, you may pay the cost. If you do, choose up to 2 《Eminence in Shadow》 characters in your waiting room, and return them to your hand.
flavor_text: Crowbars are great, Mr. Ex-Military.

name: Reflection, Akane Nishino
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【CONT】 Assist All of your characters in front of this card get +X power. X is equal to that character's level ×500.

【ACT】 [Put 2 cards from your hand into your waiting room & 【REST】 2 of your characters] Choose 1 of your characters, and that character gets the following ability until end of turn. "【CONT】 If this card would attack, you may choose 1 character in your opponent's back stage, and this card frontal attacks that character as the defending character instead."

name: Contemplative, Claire Kagenou
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【CONT】 This card gets +500 power for each of your other 《Eminence in Shadow》 characters.

【AUTO】 When this card is put into your waiting room from the stage, you may return this card to your hand. If you do, choose up to 1 《Eminence in Shadow》 character in your waiting room, and put it into your stock.

name: Unfortunate Event
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: Put the top 2 cards of your deck into your waiting room, choose up to 1 level X or lower 《Eminence in Shadow》 character in your waiting room, and return it to your hand. X is equal to the total level of the cards put into your waiting room by this effect. (Climax are regarded as level 0)

name: Stylish Ruffian Slayer
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【CONT】 All of your characters get +1000 power and +1 soul.
(【COMEBACK】: When this card triggers, you may choose 1 character in your waiting room, and return it to your hand)
flavor_text: Kidnapper: "Don't get cute with us, dammit!"

name: Containing the Magical Overload
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【CONT】 All of your characters get +2 soul.
flavor_text: I can use this blob.

name: Damsel in Distress, Akane
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【CONT】 All of your other "Crowbars Are Great, Minoru" get the following ability. "【AUTO】 When this card attacks, look at up to 2 cards from the top of your deck, choose 1 card from among them, put it on the top of your deck, and put the rest into your waiting room."

【AUTO】 Bond/"Crowbars Are Great, Minoru" [(1)] (When this card is placed on the stage from your hand or played and placed on the stage, you may pay the cost. If you do, choose 1 "Crowbars Are Great, Minoru" in your waiting room, and return it to your hand)

name: Reporting In, Alpha
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【AUTO】 1/TURN@ During your main phase or attack phase, when you draw a card, choose 1 of your characters, and that character gets +1000 power until end of turn.
【ACT】 Brainstorm [(1) 【REST】 this card] Flip over 5 cards from the top of your deck, and put them into your waiting room. For each climax revealed among those cards, draw up to 1 card.
flavor_text: The more we learn, the more powerful they appear to be.

name: Loved by All, Akane
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【CONT】 If your hand has 5 or more cards, this card gets +2000 power.
flavor_text: Please! I'm so nervous about it, I could die!

name: New Beginning, Cid Kagenou
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【CONT】 During your turn, this card gets +1000 power.
【AUTO】 When this card's battle opponent becomes 【REVERSE】, choose 1 of your other 《Eminence in Shadow》 characters, 【REST】 it, and move it to an open position of your back stage.

name: Morning Greeting, Minoru
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【AUTO】 [Put 1 other character from your stage into your waiting room] When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may pay the cost. If you do, search your deck for up to 1 climax, reveal it to your opponent, choose up to 1 climax from your hand, reveal it to your opponent, exchange them, and shuffle your deck.
flavor_text: Akane: "My name... It isn't Nishimura."

name: Arriving at School, Akane
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
flavor_text: Good morning, Kageno-kun.

name: Sibling Sparring, Claire Kagenou
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
flavor_text: Your lunge is weak!

name: Skill Demonstration, Cid Kagenou
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, this card gets +X power until end of turn. X is equal to the number of 《Eminence in Shadow》 characters you have ×1000.

【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, if you have 4 or more other 《Eminence in Shadow》 characters, you may choose 1 《Eminence in Shadow》 character in your waiting room, and put it into your stock.

name: Engaging the Enemy, Alpha
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card is placed on the stage from your hand, you may put the bottom card of your clock into your waiting room.

【AUTO】 When this card attacks, choose 1 of your 《Eminence in Shadow》 characters, and that character gets +X power until end of turn. X is equal to the number of 《Eminence in Shadow》 characters you have ×1000.
flavor_text: Beta: "It is our mission in life to annihilate the Cult of Diablos."

name: Lesson Time, Shadow
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【AUTO】 When this card attacks, you may put the top card of your deck into your waiting room. If that card is "Unfortunate Event" or an 《Eminence in Shadow》 character, deal X damage to your opponent. X is equal to the level of that card. (Damage may be canceled)
【AUTO】 【CXCOMBO】 1/TURN@ [(4)] When this card's battle opponent becomes 【REVERSE】, if "Playtime's Over" is in your climax area, you may pay the cost. If you do, 【STAND】 this card.
flavor_text: Your fighting has absolutely no finesse.

name: Playtime's Over
expansion: [TD] Trial Deck The Eminence in Shadow
ability: 【CONT】 All of your characters get +1000 power and +1 soul.
(【DRAW】: When this card triggers, you may draw 1 card)
flavor_text: Shadow: "A slime sword... Nice, isn't it?"
